title: lobelia polyphylla var. coquimbana
intro: Lobelia polyphylla var. coquimbana, also known as Chilean lobelia, is a flowering plant native to the Andes mountains in Chile. It is a member of the Lobeliaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Chilean lobelia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. Chilean lobelia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory health and alleviate various health conditions.
